creator: sf@maxempire.com
text: The suggested forked version of the script contains a lot of unnecessary modifications. One example is hardcoding usernames and paths that are CenOS/RedHat specific. Another example is slight change in config file syntax that makes old config files unusable. All this would require quite a lot of patching for which I don't have time or interest. Having said all this, it would be much better to create a separate port for this forked version as it is basically a different script, but that would require someone to volunteer their time. If the original script doesn't get updated in the near future, I would probably drop support for it and suggest for it to be removed from the ports collection.
